category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison.

title.en: China-to-Senegal EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入塞内加尔：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入塞內加爾：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against Senegal ASN standards practice, IEC 61851 / IEC 62196 technical expectations, CRSE / Senelec grid-connection context, 50 Hz supply configuration, EV policy context, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 differences.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与塞内加尔 ASN 标准实践、IEC 61851 / IEC 62196 技术期望、CRSE / Senelec 电网接入背景、50Hz 供电配置、EV政策背景以及中国 GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 差异对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與塞內加爾 ASN 標準實務、IEC 61851 / IEC 62196 技術期望、CRSE / Senelec 電網接入背景、50Hz 供電配置、EV政策背景以及中國 GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 差異對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, ASN scope determination, CRSE ruling, Senelec grid-connection approval, customs determination, tender compliance decision, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, operators, designers, and installers should verify current Senegalese standards, electricity-sector, grid-connection, installation, tax, customs, and public-charging requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、ASN适用范围裁定、CRSE裁决、Senelec并网批准、海关裁定、招标合规决定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、运营方、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核实现行塞内加尔标准、电力行业、并网、安装、税务、海关和公共充电要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、ASN適用範圍裁定、CRSE裁決、Senelec併網批准、海關裁定、招標合規決定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、營運方、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行塞內加爾標準、電力行業、併網、安裝、稅務、海關和公共充電要求。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Senegal, the practical gap is usually not a confirmed blanket whole-unit Senegal certificate. The main work is to map China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 evidence to any ASN-adopted or tender-specified IEC 61851 / IEC 62196 route, redesign GB/T connectors where an IEC connector interface is required, confirm 230 V / 400 V 50 Hz site supply and protection settings, and obtain CRSE / Senelec / project-owner acceptance for grid connection and public operation where applicable.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造充电桩进入塞内加尔时，实际差距通常不是已确认的整机统一塞内加尔证书。主要工作是将中国 GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 证据映射到任何 ASN 采纳或招标指定的 IEC 61851 / IEC 62196 路径；在要求 IEC 接口时重新设计 GB/T 连接器；确认 230V / 400V、50Hz 现场供电和保护定值；并在适用时取得 CRSE / Senelec / 项目业主对并网和公共运营的接受。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造充電樁進入塞內加爾時，實際差距通常不是已確認的整機統一塞內加爾證書。主要工作是將中國 GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 證據映射到任何 ASN 採納或招標指定的 IEC 61851 / IEC 62196 路徑；在要求 IEC 介面時重新設計 GB/T 連接器；確認 230V / 400V、50Hz 現場供電和保護定值；並在適用時取得 CRSE / Senelec / 項目業主對併網和公共營運的接受。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, government gazette, utility, conformity assessment body, customs authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
